title: My Brother Forged The Will, Took The Cottage, Called Me A Tenant. So I Rent It To Him For $300
description: After 30 years of paying the mortgage on our mother's $280,000 beach cottage while my brother lived rent-free, he produced a forged will claiming I was just a tenant. Secret letters from Mom and a handwriting expert helped me prove the forgery and win the cottage back. Now he pays me $300 a night to rent that same cottage on the platform I founded. #FamilyBetrayal #InheritanceScam #PettyRevenge
thumb_text: HE FORGED THE WILL, NOW HE RENTS IT FROM ME
pinned_comment: If your own brother forged your mother's will to steal the beach cottage you'd been paying for, how would you have handled it? Share your own family betrayal story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: SHE WROTE HE'D FORGE A WILL, SO I HIRED A HANDWRITING EXPERT
